summary: Shrink the virtual M2 stripe (see spgM3StripePushDown) by given total site units, splitting value to each side, starting on left. e.g. value of 1 shrinks by 1 site on left, 2 shrinks by 1 site on each side, value of 3 shrinks 2 sites on left and 1 on right.
description: Shrink the virtual M2 stripe (see spgM3StripePushDown) by given total site units, splitting value to each side, starting on left. e.g. value of 1 shrinks by 1 site on left, 2 shrinks by 1 site on each side, value of 3 shrinks 2 sites on left and 1 on right.
